name: Library Restaurant and Bar
cuisine: 西餐酒吧 / 精緻調酒
targetKeywords: Library Restaurant and Bar訂座評價
香港自由行尖沙咀寶藏餐廳
lastUpdated: 剛剛 (已實時抓取並同步 3 大語言)

articles.title: 【尖沙咀美食】Library Restaurant and Bar 正式登場！CP值爆燈，放工打卡必去！
articles.excerpt: 放工想同朋友歎一頓高質西餐酒吧 / 精緻調酒？尖沙咀最新熱門「Library Restaurant and Bar」正式登陸！一齊睇下有咩必食亮點...
articles.content:
【尖沙咀超強新店】Library Restaurant and Bar 正式登場！

位於尖沙咀核心位置，主打優質西餐酒吧 / 精緻調酒。

🔥 本地老饕推薦必食亮點：
1. 本地人推薦超高 CP 值招牌菜色與手工特調雞尾酒
2. 英倫圖書館風格奢華環境，適合朋友生日打卡及放工聚會
3. 支持線上預約，輕鬆訂座非常方便！

articles.topic: 小紅書種草 & 寶藏酒吧
articles.title: 【香港自由行宝藏】尖沙咀氛围感天花板！Library Restaurant and Bar 精致调酒种草！
articles.excerpt: 姐妹们冲就完事了！香港尖沙咀这家 Library Restaurant and Bar 真的太出片了！氛围感爆棚，内附保姆级订位避坑指南…
articles.content:
姐妹们冲就完事了！香港尖沙咀这家【Library Restaurant and Bar】真的太出片了！

每次来香港自由行必回购的宝藏西餐酒吧！英伦复古图书馆风格，复古怀旧感拉满！

🌟 必点神仙单品：
• 招牌烟燻特调鸡尾酒：入口层次丰富，颜值极高！
• 熟成安格斯炭烤肋眼牛排：肉质鲜嫩多汁，绝美出片！

💡 小贴士：支持微信/支付宝扫码点餐，记得提前在线预约！

articles.title: Tsim Sha Tsui Dining Guide: Library Restaurant and Bar Delivers British Elegance & Craft Cocktails
articles.excerpt: Looking for top-tier cocktail lounge dining in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong? Library Restaurant and Bar pairs handcrafted mixology with British library elegance...
articles.content:
Looking for top-tier lounge dining in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong?

Library Restaurant and Bar pairs daily fresh prime cuts with handcrafted signature cocktails. Located in the heart of Tsim Sha Tsui, this British library-themed sanctuary offers an unforgettable nightout experience.

✨ Highlights for International Guests:
1. Signature Smoked Craft Cocktails & Wine Pairings
2. English Menu & Fully English-Speaking Concierge
3. Instant Online Table Reservation
